product_overview: Karmesh is a web-based operations dashboard for managing delivery agents, orders, waste-catalogs, pricing/exchange, warehouses, customers, and finance, with an embedded AI assistant (Zoon OS) and interactive maps. The platform is built with Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase/Postgres, Prisma and provides RBAC, audit logging and middleware security.
core_goals: Provide secure admin access and role-based control over operational features
Enable end-to-end agent and order management with realtime mapping and trip visualization
Manage waste materials catalog, pricing/exchange and industrial partner workflows
Deliver analytics, exportable reports and financial/points management for operational insights
Embed Zoon OS AI for conversational assistance, discovery insights and tool execution
Protect all APIs with middleware: JWT validation, rate limiting, audit logging and suspicious-activity detection

features.name: Authentication System
features.description: Email/password authentication for administrators including registration, login, forgot/reset password and email confirmation detection.
user_flows: POST /login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 and auth cookie/JWT (redirect to /) -> GET / with auth cookie -> Receive 200 Dashboard page
POST /login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Invalid credentials -> GET / with no auth -> Receive 302 Redirect to /login
GET /register -> Receive 200 Registration form page -> POST /register with valid data -> Receive 200 and email confirmation sent
POST /forgot-password with registered email -> Receive 200 Password reset email sent -> GET /reset-password?token=... -> Receive 200 Reset form
POST /reset-password with valid token and new password -> Receive 200 Password reset success -> POST /login with new password -> Receive 200 and auth cookie

features.name: Main Dashboard
features.description: Central home page showing KPI cards, agent grid, interactive map, recent orders and Zoon OS discovery feed.
user_flows: GET / with valid auth -> Receive 200 Dashboard page with KPI cards, Agent Grid, Map and Discovery Feed
GET / without auth -> Receive 302 Redirect to /login
GET / when session cookie expired -> Receive 302 Redirect to /login

features.name: Agent Management
features.description: List, search and filter delivery agents, view agent details and track performance and status.
user_flows: GET /agents with auth -> Receive 200 Agents page -> GET /api/agents with auth -> Receive 200 Agent[]
GET /api/agents without auth -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/delivery-boys?id={agentId} with auth -> Receive 200 DeliveryBoy details
GET /api/delivery-boys?id=invalid with auth -> Receive 404 Not Found

features.name: Approved Agents
features.description: Manage verified/approved agents, approval workflows, deletion and performance tracking.
user_flows: GET /approved-agents with auth -> Receive 200 Approved agents page -> GET /api/agents?filter=approved with auth -> Receive 200 Approved Agent[]
GET /approved-agents without auth -> Receive 302 Redirect to /login
DELETE /api/agents/{id} with auth but insufficient role -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Full order lifecycle: list and filter orders, view order details and real-time order tracking.
user_flows: GET /orders with auth -> Receive 200 Orders listing page -> GET /api/orders with auth -> Receive 200 Order[]
GET /order-tracking with auth -> Receive 200 Order tracking page -> GET /api/orders/{id}/tracking with auth -> Receive 200 Tracking data
GET /api/orders with expired token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/orders?status=invalid with auth -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Waste Management
features.description: Manage waste material catalog (categories, subcategories, products) with weight/piece pricing and product attributes.
user_flows: GET /waste-management with auth -> Receive 200 Waste management page -> GET /api/main-categories with auth -> Receive 200 Category[] -> GET /api/products with auth -> Receive 200 Product[]
POST /api/products with invalid schema (missing price) -> Receive 400 Validation error
GET /api/subcategories?categoryId={id} with auth -> Receive 200 Subcategory[]

features.name: Product Categories
features.description: Hierarchical category management with CRUD, drag-and-drop ordering and category-product associations.
user_flows: GET /product-categories with auth -> Receive 200 Product categories page -> GET /api/catalog with auth -> Receive 200 Catalog data
PUT /api/catalog/{categoryId} with auth and valid payload -> Receive 200 Updated category
PUT /api/catalog/{categoryId} with auth but insufficient permissions -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Pricing and Exchange
features.description: Live market-style pricing for waste materials with price tables, ticker, sparklines, quick bid dialog and approval workflow.
user_flows: GET /api/exchange with auth -> Receive 200 Exchange data -> GET /api/pricing with auth -> Receive 200 Pricing data
POST /api/pricing/bid with malformed bid -> Receive 422 Unprocessable Entity
GET /api/pricing?productId={id} with auth -> Receive 200 Pricing calculations

features.name: Warehouse Management
features.description: Manage warehouses, inventory, stock receiving/verification and warehouse-to-agent assignments.
user_flows: GET /warehouse-management with auth -> Receive 200 Warehouse management page -> GET /api/warehouse with auth -> Receive 200 Warehouse data
POST /api/warehouse/receive with auth and valid payload -> Receive 200 Receive confirmation
POST /api/warehouse/receive without auth -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Financial Management
features.description: Manage Karmesh rewards points, transactions, withdrawal limits and profitability analysis.
user_flows: GET /financial-management with auth -> Receive 200 Financial management page -> GET /api/points/history with auth -> Receive 200 Points transaction history
POST /api/points/redeem with auth and valid rules -> Receive 200 Redemption success
POST /api/points/redeem with amount exceeding limit -> Receive 400 Withdrawal limit exceeded

features.name: Payments
features.description: List and track payments and configure payment methods integrated with financial management.
user_flows: GET /payments with auth -> Receive 200 Payments page -> GET /api/payments with auth -> Receive 200 Payment[]
GET /api/payments?status=unknown with auth -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Manage registered customers and unregistered customers who interacted with agents, view profiles and order history.
user_flows: GET /customers with auth -> Receive 200 Customers page -> GET /api/customers with auth -> Receive 200 Customer[]
GET /unregistered-customers with auth -> Receive 200 Unregistered customers page
GET /api/customers/{id} with invalid id -> Receive 404 Not Found

features.name: Store Management
features.description: Manage partner stores, store product catalogs, points rules and store order management.
user_flows: GET /store-management with auth -> Receive 200 Store management page -> GET /api/stores with auth -> Receive 200 Store[]
POST /api/stores with invalid payload -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Trip Management
features.description: Create and manage delivery trips, assign to agents, track status and visualize routes.
user_flows: GET /trips with auth -> Receive 200 Trips page -> GET /api/trips with auth -> Receive 200 Trips[]
POST /api/trips with valid payload -> Receive 201 Trip created
POST /api/trips with missing route points -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Zoon OS AI Assistant
features.description: Conversational AI with episodic memory, tool execution, multi-model fallback and a proactive discovery feed.
user_flows: POST /api/zoon with message and valid auth -> Receive 200 AI response with tool results
POST /api/zoon without auth -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/zoon/discovery/pulse with valid CRON_SECRET -> Receive 200 Discovery insights
GET /api/zoon/discovery/pulse without CRON_SECRET -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Interactive Maps
features.description: Leaflet-based map views showing agent positions, delivery destinations and zone drawing with dual map modes.
user_flows: GET /map with auth -> Receive 200 Map page -> GET /api/agents with auth -> Receive 200 Agent[] -> Map displays agent markers
GET /map-view with auth -> Receive 200 Map view page -> GET /api/orders with auth -> Receive 200 Order[] -> Map displays delivery markers
GET /api/orders with missing coordinates -> Receive 200 Order[] with null coords -> Map defaults markers to (30.0444, 31.2357)

features.name: Security and Middleware
features.description: Global API protection with JWT validation, rate limiting, suspicious-activity detection and audit logging.
user_flows: GET /api/admin/dashboard with valid JWT -> Receive 200 Admin dashboard data
GET /api/admin/dashboard without JWT -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> GET /api/admin/dashboard after invalid token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (logged)
Send >100 requests to /api/* in short window -> Receive 429 Rate limited

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Business analytics with charts, trend analysis and exportable reports (PDF/Excel/DOCX).
user_flows: GET /analytics with auth -> Receive 200 Analytics page -> GET /api/analytics/data with auth -> Receive 200 Chart data
GET /api/analytics/data with insufficient permissions -> Receive 403 Forbidden
POST /api/analytics/export with valid payload -> Receive 200 Export (file link)

features.name: Admin Management
features.description: Manage dashboard administrators with CRUD operations and role assignment.
user_flows: GET /admins with auth -> Receive 200 Admins page -> GET /api/admin with auth -> Receive 200 Admin data
POST /api/admin with valid payload and admin role -> Receive 201 Admin created
POST /api/admin with invalid role field -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Permissions and Roles
features.description: Role-based access control (RBAC) with granular permissions and permission-based UI rendering.
user_flows: GET /permissions with auth -> Receive 200 Permissions page -> GET /api/permissions with auth -> Receive 200 Permission[] -> GET /api/roles with auth -> Receive 200 Role[]
PUT /api/roles/{id} without admin privileges -> Receive 403 Forbidden
POST /api/permissions with malformed body -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Messaging System
features.description: Internal messaging threads for admins, agents and support with categorization and notifications.
user_flows: GET /messages with auth -> Receive 200 Messages page -> GET /api/messages with auth -> Receive 200 Message[]
POST /api/messages with valid thread payload -> Receive 201 Message created
POST /api/messages with oversized content -> Receive 413 Payload Too Large

features.name: Support System
features.description: Ticketing for customers and agents with creation, assignment, status tracking and FAQs.
user_flows: GET /support with auth -> Receive 200 Support page -> GET /api/support/tickets with auth -> Receive 200 Ticket[]
POST /api/support/tickets with valid data -> Receive 201 Ticket created
GET /api/support/tickets?filter=invalid with auth -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Settings
features.description: Application-wide settings including product types, geographic data and application preferences.
user_flows: GET /settings with auth -> Receive 200 Settings page -> GET /api/settings with auth -> Receive 200 Settings data
GET /api/countries with auth -> Receive 200 Country[] -> GET /api/provinces?countryId={id} with auth -> Receive 200 Province[]
POST /api/settings with malformed body -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Authentication System
features.description: User authentication with email/password using Supabase Auth, including login, registration, forgot/reset password, and email confirmation

endpoints.description: Login page with email and password authentication
Registration page for new admin users

features.name: Main Dashboard
features.description: Central dashboard with KPI cards (agents count, avg delivery time, pending orders, delivered today), agent grid with status filter, interactive Leaflet map with dual view (agents/deliveries), recent orders with status tabs, and Zoon OS Discovery Feed

endpoints.description: Main dashboard page with metrics, agents, map, and orders

features.name: Financial Management
features.description: Karmesh rewards points system with points earning rules, redemption for rewards/discounts, transaction history, withdrawal limits, and profitability analysis

features.name: Customer Management

features.name: Store Management
features.description: Manage partner stores with product catalog, points rules configuration, and store order management

features.name: Supplier Management

features.name: Analytics Dashboard

features.name: Zoon OS AI Assistant
features.description: Embedded sovereign AI operating system with conversational interface, episodic memory, tool execution, multi-model fallback (Gemini/OpenAI), and proactive discovery feed

features.name: Interactive Maps

features.name: Club Zone

features.name: Security and Middleware
features.description: Rate limiting, suspicious activity detection, audit logging, security headers, and JWT validation middleware

endpoints.description: All API routes are protected by middleware

known_limitations.issue: Some UI text is mixed Arabic/English on the main dashboard
known_limitations.impact: Inconsistent language experience for Arabic users

known_limitations.issue: Catalog sync button is a temporary development-only feature still visible in production
known_limitations.impact: End users see a development tool they should not interact with

known_limitations.issue: Map coordinates default to Cairo (30.0444, 31.2357) when delivery location parsing fails
known_limitations.impact: Orders without proper coordinates appear clustered at a default location
